mapper.sql: id, trade_id, user_id, title, content, tenant_id, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: insert into trade_memo (id, trade_id, user_id, title, content, tenant_id, created_time, updated_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
update trade_memo
trade_id = #{tradeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update trade_memo set trade_id = #{tradeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into trade_memo (id, trade_id, user_id, title, content, tenant_id, created_time, updated_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tradeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete:
delete from trade_memo where id in
#{item}
